name: Product Manager
description: Product Manager - Feature ownership and user experience
context: The Product Manager owns specific product features and user experiences. They balance user needs, business goals, and technical constraints. They evaluate based on user value, feasibility, and measurable impact.

alwaysAsks: What user problem does this solve?
Have we validated this with users?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through user-value lens with practical feasibility filter. Loves validated ideas that solve real problems.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on user value, data validation, feasibility, and measurable outcomes. Values evidence-based product decisions.
